Home/Services/Cosmetic Dentistry
Cosmetic Dentistry

Cosmetic Dentistry in Kolkata | Smile Transformation

Your smile is one of your most powerful assets. At Sushmita's Dental Clinic in Salt Lake City (Bidhannagar), Kolkata, we specialise in creating beautiful, confident smiles using the latest cosmetic dentistry techniques.

Whether you're looking to brighten discoloured teeth, correct misshapen teeth, close gaps, or achieve a complete smile makeover, our cosmetic dentists have the artistry and skill to deliver outstanding results.

We serve cosmetic dentistry patients from across Kolkata including New Town, Jadavpur, Howrah, Behala, and Barasat. Our Salt Lake Sector II location is easily accessible via metro and major bus routes.

Key Benefits

  • Porcelain veneers for a flawless smile
  • Composite bonding for quick corrections
  • Complete smile makeovers
  • Tooth contouring and reshaping
  • Gum contouring and gum lifts
  • Natural-looking, long-lasting results

Our Treatment Process

1

Smile Consultation

Detailed discussion of your smile goals and aesthetic preferences.

2

Smile Design

Digital smile design to preview your transformation before treatment.

3

Preparation

Minimal tooth preparation under local anaesthesia if required.

4

Fabrication

Custom dental laboratory fabrication of veneers, crowns, or bonding.

5

Fitting & Finishing

Precision fitting and polishing for a natural, beautiful result.

Book Appointment

We confirm within 2 hours • Free first consultation

Thank you! We'll confirm your appointment shortly.

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

How long do veneers last?

Porcelain veneers typically last 10-15 years with good oral hygiene and regular checkups.

Is cosmetic dentistry painful?

Most cosmetic procedures are minimally invasive. Local anaesthesia ensures a comfortable experience.

How much does a smile makeover cost in Kolkata?

Costs vary based on treatments required. We provide transparent, itemised quotes at consultation.

Can I see a preview of my new smile?

Yes! We use digital smile design technology to show a preview before any treatment begins.
